adjusted.description: Whether to return adjusted data. Only applicable to intraday endpoints.

interval.description: Time-series data point interval. Required for intraday endpoints.

outputsize.description: Whether to return full or compact data (the last 100 data points).

base_url.description: Placeholder base URL used only to construct the engine runtime before the Tier-2 hook delegates to the legacy connector.

mode.description: Set to fixture for credential-free legacy fixture tests.
